__body.sql:
SELECT  
        TDRCM.DATASET_ID
        ,TDRCM.TABLE_NM
        ,TDRCM.COLUMN_NM
        ,TDRCM.DATA_TYPE
        ,TO_CHAR(TDRCM.CREATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS CREATE_TIME
        ,TO_CHAR(TDRM.UPDATE_TIME, 'YYYY-MM-DD HH24:MI:SS') AS UPDATE_TIME
        ,TDRCM.PK_YN
        ,TDRCM.NULL_YN
        ,EXEC_MODE_CD
        ,FIXED_DELAY
        FROM DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_COL_MST TDRCM
        INNER JOIN DATAHUB.TB_DATASET_REQ_MST TDRM
        ON TDRCM.DATASET_ID = TDRM.DATASET_ID 
    WHERE 1=1
        AND TDRCM.DATASET_ID = 41
